arts.ttl: Former Barcelona star labels Real Madrid ‘the best team in the world right now’

arts.ttl: Tebas reveals doubts over Barca’s VIP seats deal amid Olmo saga
arts.sum: In the internal appeals that Barcelona presented, LaLiga’s Economic Control Committee applied the validation rule and found that one of the companies involved had a share capital of only 3,000 euros and was run by an unknown person, with several businesses of dubious origin. FC Barcelona appealed to LaLiga’s internal bodies because we had refused or put a very high guarantee on those contracts,” he said via Mundo Deportivo.
